toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed information about a Discord guild (server) including name, description, member count, icon, features, and verification level.

guild_id.description: The unique snowflake ID of the Discord guild

with_counts.description: Include approximate member and presence counts

toolPurpose: List all channels in a guild including text, voice, category, announcement, and forum channels with position, topic, and permission overwrites.

guild_id.description: The unique snowflake ID of the Discord guild

toolPurpose: Retrieve messages from a specific channel with pagination support. Returns message content, author, timestamps, embeds, attachments, and reactions.

channel_id.description: The unique snowflake ID of the channel

before.description: Get messages before this message ID (for pagination)

after.description: Get messages after this message ID (for pagination)

around.description: Get messages around this message ID

toolPurpose: Send a message to a specific channel. Supports plain text, embeds, components, and message references (replies). WRITE operation — requires explicit Mind confirmation before execution.

channel_id.description: The unique snowflake ID of the target channel

content.description: The message text content (up to 2000 characters)

embeds.description: Array of embed objects (up to 10 per message)

tts.description: Whether this is a text-to-speech message

toolPurpose: List members of a guild with pagination. Returns user profiles, nicknames, roles, join dates, and avatar information.

guild_id.description: The unique snowflake ID of the Discord guild

limit.description: Max number of members to return (1-1000)

after.description: Get members after this user ID (for pagination)

toolPurpose: Add or remove a role from a guild member. WRITE operation — requires explicit Mind confirmation before execution. Used for automated moderation, onboarding flows, and community engagement rewards.

guild_id.description: The unique snowflake ID of the Discord guild

user_id.description: The unique snowflake ID of the user

role_id.description: The unique snowflake ID of the role to assign

action.description: Whether to add or remove the role
